  rectangular cuboid with all 7 distances (3 edges, 3 face diagonals, 1 space diagonal) being integers. Unknown

  equations.

  rectangular cuboid with all 7 distances (3 edges, 3 face diagonals, 1 space diagonal) being integers. Unknown

  equations.
